<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] < 100:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} px={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")

print("\n=== Rows 30-36 ===")
for i in range(30, 37):
    print(f"{i}: {ascii_lines[i][8:56]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
